scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js --minify && cp public/index.html dist/index.html && cp public/styles.css dist/styles.css
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp public/index.html dist/index.html && cp public/styles.css dist/styles.css && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js --watch --servedir=dist
